type_1_rectangle.data_semantics: Background rectangle. engine.newRun writes Data as [0, 0, width, height], but RenderFH6 treats shapes[0] specially and fills the whole canvas from shapes[0].Color RGB instead of rasterizing this rectangle.
type_1_rectangle.preview_behavior: shapes[0] is background; Data is effectively ignored by RenderFH6. Background alpha is ignored when transparentBG is false.

type_2_rotated_rectangle.rotation_direction: Use source formula: xr = dx*cos(theta) + dy*sin(theta), yr = -dx*sin(theta) + dy*cos(theta), theta converted by pi/180.

type_16_rotated_ellipse.rotation_direction: Use source formula: xr = dx*cos(theta) + dy*sin(theta), yr = -dx*sin(theta) + dy*cos(theta), theta converted by pi/180.

color.rgb_semantics: RGB channels are stored as sRGB bytes.
color.alpha_semantics: Straight alpha. 0 is transparent, 255 is opaque. Effective alpha is Color[3]/255, multiplied by per-pixel coverage for gradients and masks.
color.compositing: RenderFH6 decodes RGB to linear light and uses source-over blending, then converts RGB back to sRGB for preview output.

layer_order.render_order: Array order. shapes[0] is background; shapes[1:] are rendered from low index to high index, each later shape composited over earlier shapes.

preview_canvas.size_rule: Preview size is the prepared generation width and height. Load can downscale by maxRes; region/crop and pad-transparent paths can change working size before mapping back.
preview_canvas.background_rule: If transparentBG is false, the preview canvas is filled with shapes[0].Color RGB at alpha 1. If transparentBG is true, the canvas starts transparent.
preview_canvas.antialiasing: RenderFH6 supports optional SSAA and linear-light box downsampling. Studio final preview uses ss=1; CLI preview can use the -ss value.
